allowedUse: Document as source intelligence.
Route to existing project-owned scripts when already configured.
Use as reviewed metadata for future approval decisions.
forbiddenUse: Do not install or activate from registry presence.
Do not configure CI, MCP, hooks, credentials, or global settings.
Do not copy raw upstream files into active runtime paths.

enterpriseRisk.defaultEnterpriseStatus: metadata-only; unreviewed-blocked; blocked from enterprise approval until owner review records evidence
enterpriseRisk.reviewEvidence: No current enterprise review evidence is recorded; registry presence is metadata-only and all execution/install environments remain blocked until owner review.
uninspectedAreas: permission model during installation or CI
enterpriseRisk.riskRationale: No current evidence-backed tool review is recorded beyond metadata presence.

tools.ciPromotion: ci-blocking-after-calibration only after stable project evidence and explicit owner approval.
